title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Freeths Legal PO Scheme Ltd
body: "Application number 5122  Applicant Freeths LLP objected to the name used by Freeths Legal PO Scheme Ltd under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal. "
